name: what-fw
description: The web framework built for AI agents

scripts.release:verify: npm run -s hygiene:publish && npm run -s test && npm run -s build && npm run -s test:prod && npm run -s bench:gate
scripts.release:patch: node scripts/bump-version.mjs patch && npm run -s release:verify && npm run -s release:publish
scripts.release:minor: node scripts/bump-version.mjs minor && npm run -s release:verify && npm run -s release:publish
scripts.release:major: node scripts/bump-version.mjs major && npm run -s release:verify && npm run -s release:publish
scripts.test: node --test packages/core/test/*.test.js packages/what-text/test/*.test.js packages/router/test/*.test.js packages/server/test/*.test.js packages/cache/test/*.test.js packages/compiler/test/*.test.js packages/create-what/test/*.test.js packages/cli/test/*.test.js packages/devtools-mcp/test/*.test.js examples/kanban/test/*.test.js examples/blog/test/*.test.js examples/shop/test/*.test.js && npm run -s test:stress
